title: Smoky Borshch with Crumbly Ukrainian Flatbread
description: A hearty Ukrainian-inspired borshch recipe with smoky flavor, served with crumbly flatbread for dipping. This beet-based stew is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add beets, carrots, and paprika. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add canned tomatoes, borshch, and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
Serve with crumbly flatbread and a dollop of sour cream and chopped fresh dill if desired.
Place flatbread on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
